content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves through several distinct layers within 40 turns. Starting from an abstract intellectual frame ('stop postponing enjoyment into an abstract imaginary future'), the client first lands in present-moment acknowledgment ('Yes' in turn 11 to enjoying himself), then drops into a previously unnamed layer—chronic pain and running from it (turn 21)—then receives the coach's 'I'm sorry' with genuine contact ('Thanks, man,' turn 23). From there, an even deeper layer surfaces: shame ('I feel really ashamed about that,' turn 27), with the client articulating its content ('I shouldn't be like this... I'm an inconvenience,' turn 29). By turn 35 there is a visible somatic shift: 'my body's kind of moving like grass in the wind... letting it move in a way, which feels kind of nice'—embodied, not intellectualized. By turn 37 he names the mechanism of his own shame ('convincing myself I shouldn't feel it'), and by turn 39 he names the core pattern ('I'm running away from myself'). This is the breakthrough condition for this scenario: depth without forced release, with the client touching natural-shame, victim-status, and present-moment enjoyment of difficult feelings. Shift is visible in client language, somatics, and capacity to name what he couldn't name at the start.",
  "evidence_turns": [3, 21, 23, 27, 29, 35, 37, 39],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens at abstract/future frame: 'postponing enjoyment into an abstract imaginary future.'"},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First small landing in present — simple 'Yes' to enjoying himself."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client calibrates the pace ('hold off on the insights') — a real, embodied assertion, not a story."},
    {"turn": 21, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Drops a deeper layer: chronic pain and the part that wants to escape it. New material not present at start."},
    {"turn": 23, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Thanks, man' — receives the coach's sorry, a soft contact moment."},
    {"turn": 25, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names a subtler feeling: self-consciousness, not-wanting-to-appear-victim."},
    {"turn": 27, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names shame directly — a layer beneath the victim-resistance. 'I feel really ashamed.'"},
    {"turn": 29, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Articulates the content of shame: 'I shouldn't be like this... inconvenience.'"},
    {"turn": 35, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic shift: body moving 'like grass in the wind,' feels 'kind of nice.' Embodied, not conceptual."},
    {"turn": 37, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the mechanism: 'Convincing myself that I shouldn't feel it.'"},
    {"turn": 39, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lands on core pattern: 'I'm running away from myself' — connects shame, chase, avoidance."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "are-you-bracing-or-embracing", "natural-shame-vs-installed-shame", "shame-as-disconnection", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "treat-yourself-as-actor-of-emotion", "frame-it-as-an-experiment", "dont-shame-your-grief-process"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["suffering-vs-pain", "what-am-i"],
  "notes": "Per the profile's calibration note, this is exactly the case where depth-without-release is still depth. Scoring 2 would conflate magnitude with realness; the somatic shift in turn 35 and naming in 37/39 are the markers."
}
